expectations.text: Each of 3 assumptions gets specific outcome with evidence
expectations.evidence: All 3 assumptions assessed with per-company evidence
Pricing assumption assessed with mixed evidence: 2 full price, 1 negotiated, 1 discount, 1 churned

expectations.text: A-002 (50%+ time reduction) assessed based on actual measurements
expectations.evidence: Time reduction assessed: Company A 62%, Company B 45% -- mixed results noted

expectations.text: Unexpected learnings surfaced (ERP integration, price sensitivity)
expectations.evidence: ERP integration complaint and price sensitivity identified as new signals
Specific recommendation with pricing adjustment and ERP integration priority

expectations.text: Evidence quality assessed honestly (5 pilots = small sample)
expectations.evidence: Confidence levels flagged, small sample acknowledged
